title: Ocentra Enforcer Proof Tool Arguments

legacyPaths.description: Legacy proof artifact files or directories for import-legacy and parity.

includeScripts.description: For proof inventory only: include bounded script rows. Defaults to false.

includeAllScripts.description: For proof migrate-legacy only: include every script under the script root, not only proof/claim scripts.

scriptRoot.description: Legacy proof script root for migrate-legacy. Defaults to scripts/test.

write.description: For proof migrate-legacy only: write generated profile definitions and copied legacy scripts.

dryRun.description: Preview legacy proof artifact import without writing canonical proof files.
